/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/pqtool.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/pqtool.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pqtool.dir/PQConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pqtool.dir/PQKeyManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pqtool.dir/MLDSAEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pqtool.dir/MLKEMEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pqtool.dir/PQCertificate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pqtool.dir/PQNegativeTests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pqtool.dir/PQBatchTools.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pqtool.dir/PQKAT.cpp.o -o pqtool  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kali/Desktop/REPORT_5_LAB/lab6/lab6/../liboqs/build_linux/lib /home/kali/Desktop/REPORT_5_LAB/lab6/lab6/../liboqs/build_linux/lib/liboqs.so
